crime.value: Theft of valuable rings from Egyptian Chamber display case; attendant found dead embracing mummy
crime.quote: One of the cases containing valuable rings had been opened and rifled.

victim.value: Museum attendant of uncertain age with eccentric habits and no living relations
victim.quote: It is said that he was a man of uncertain age and eccentric habits, without any living relations

closed_world.quote: Yesterday morning a strange discovery was made in the principal Egyptian Chamber.

culprit_and_motive.value: Sosra the Egyptian, seeking to reclaim ancient rings to restore his mortality after centuries of cursed life
culprit_and_motive.quote: I shall at last be able to shake off that accursed health which has been worse to me than the foulest disease.

resolution.value: Sosra successfully obtains the ring but dies in the attempt, found embracing the mummy; authorities misinterpret as theft
resolution.quote: So close was his embrace that it was only with the utmost difficulty that they were separated.

investigator.value: Mr. John Vansittart Smith, who witnessed Sosra's confession and reads the official account in the newspaper
investigator.quote: It was on the second day after his return to London that Mr. John Vansittart Smith saw the following

red_herring.value: Egyptian supernatural curse narrative used to obscure theft of ancient elixir
red_herring.quote: The authorities are of opinion that the man was bearing away the mummy with some idea of selling it

clue_fairness.value: Crystal container and platinum testing method revealed to reader before resolution
clue_fairness.quote: A glance at the crystal has shown me that the liquid is indeed within it

social_world.value: Naval hierarchy and academic Egyptian studies creating access to restricted materials
social_world.quote: There is considerable discontent among the crew, many of whom are anxious to get back home

alibi.value: Museum attendant's death staged as heart failure during robbery attempt
alibi.quote: struck down in the very act by long-standing disease of the heart

reveal_mechanic.value: Chemical testing for platinum to identify correct ancient elixir container
reveal_mechanic.quote: I had to test for the platinum to be sure of the one which I wanted

media_and_audience.value: Press narrative frames death as failed theft rather than successful ancient ritual
media_and_audience.quote: Curious Occurrence in the Louvre.--Yesterday morning a strange discovery was made

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the captain of the polestar
